title: ModeConfig dataclass — collapse 3 response paths into 1
depends_on: T-082 (R1 god collapse must be done first)
resolution: All three stages complete. Stage A (2026-05-18): ModeConfig grew 5 behavior-flag fields. Stage B+C (2026-05-23): _respond_via_config implemented — single unified response path for all 3 modes. _respond_root and _respond_normie deleted. pi_agent.py net reduction >200 lines. Two new ModeConfig fields added: use_split_prompt (root+normie=True, routes through build_system_prompt_split for Anthropic cache) and single_message_ctx (normie=True, sends only current turn to LLM). All modes verified via test suite. verify.py PASS.
